paper_metadata.title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation
paper_metadata.abstract: This paper demonstrates that multilingual denoising pre-training produces significant performance gains across a wide variety of machine translation (MT) tasks. We present mBART -- a sequence-to-sequence denoising auto-encoder pre-trained on large-scale monolingual corpora in many languages using the BART objective. mBART is one of the first methods for pre-training a complete sequence-to-sequence model by denoising full texts in multiple languages, while previous approaches have focused only on the encoder, decoder, or reconstructing parts of the text. Pre-training a complete model allows it to be directly fine tuned for supervised (both sentence-level and document-level) and unsupervised machine translation, with no task-specific modifications. We demonstrate that adding mBART initialization produces performance gains in all but the highest-resource settings, including up to 12 BLEU points for low resource MT and over 5 BLEU points for many document-level and unsupervised models. We also show it also enables new types of transfer to language pairs with no bi-text or that were not in the pre-training corpus, and present extensive analysis of which factors contribute the most to effective pre-training.

extraction_data.innovation: Multilingual denoising pre-training using sentence permutation and word-span masking as noise functions, enabling strong zero-shot and few-shot transfer across diverse language pairs. A single multilingual model is used for all tasks, with language ID tokens added at encoder and decoder inputs.
extraction_data.pretraining_task: Multilingual denoising pre-training with sentence permutation and word-span masking
extraction_data.pretraining_corpus: 25 languages including En, De, Fr, Es, Cs, Ro, It, Ja, Ko, Vi, Tr, Nl, Ar, My, Ne, Si, Hi, Et, Lt, Fi, Lv, Zh, Ru, and others from WMT, IWSLT, FLoRes, WAT, ITTB, and CC25
extraction_data.finetuning_task: Fine-tuning on downstream machine translation tasks with teacher forcing
extraction_data.research_problem: Neural Machine Translation (NMT) in low- and medium-resource language pairs
extraction_data.application: Machine translation, multilingual language modeling, cross-lingual transfer learning
extraction_data.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

extraction_data.innovation: mBART02 is a smaller variant of mBART trained on 2 languages (En-Ro), demonstrating that even minimal multilingual pre-training improves performance on low-resource translation tasks.
extraction_data.application: Machine translation, zero-shot translation, multilingual language modeling
extraction_data.research_problem: Neural Machine Translation in low- and medium-resource language pairs
extraction_data.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation

extraction_data.innovation: mBART06 is a medium-sized variant trained on 6 languages, showing that increasing the number of pre-training languages improves performance, especially in low-resource settings.
extraction_data.application: Machine translation, zero-shot translation, multilingual language modeling
extraction_data.research_problem: Neural Machine Translation in low- and medium-resource language pairs
extraction_data.paper_title: Multilingual Denoising Pre-training for Neural Machine Translation
